jaxlibxc
  • API Reference
  • Variable Transforms
  • View page source

Variable Transforms

Converts user inputs (rho, sigma, lapl, tau) into internal variables (rs, zeta, xt, xs0, xs1, u0, u1, t0, t1) with density thresholding matching libxc.

Variable transformations from user inputs to internal variables.

Converts (rho, sigma, lapl, tau) -> (rs, zeta, xt, xs0, xs1, u0, u1, t0, t1) with density thresholding matching libxc’s work_{lda,gga,mgga}_inc.c.

jaxlibxc._transforms.transform_lda_unpol(rho, dens_threshold=1e-15)[source]

Transform unpolarized LDA inputs to (rs, zeta=0).

Parameters:

rho – array of shape (N,) – total electron density

Returns:

Wigner-Seitz radius, shape (N,) zeta: spin polarization (all zeros), shape (N,) mask: boolean mask where density is above threshold

Return type:

rs

jaxlibxc._transforms.transform_lda_pol(rho, dens_threshold=1e-15)[source]

Transform polarized LDA inputs to (rs, zeta).

Parameters:

rho – array of shape (N, 2) – [rho_up, rho_down]

Returns:

rs, zeta, mask

jaxlibxc._transforms.transform_gga_unpol(rho, sigma, dens_threshold=1e-15, sigma_threshold=1e-15)[source]

Transform unpolarized GGA inputs to (rs, zeta, xt, xs0, xs1).

Parameters:

  • rho – (N,) total density

  • sigma – (N,) squared gradient magnitude

Returns:

rs, zeta, xt, xs0, xs1, mask

jaxlibxc._transforms.transform_gga_pol(rho, sigma, dens_threshold=1e-15, sigma_threshold=1e-15)[source]

Transform polarized GGA inputs to (rs, zeta, xt, xs0, xs1).

Parameters:

  • rho – (N, 2) [rho_up, rho_down]

  • sigma – (N, 3) [sigma_uu, sigma_ud, sigma_dd]

Returns:

rs, zeta, xt, xs0, xs1, mask

jaxlibxc._transforms.transform_mgga_unpol(rho, sigma, lapl, tau, dens_threshold=1e-15, sigma_threshold=1e-15, tau_threshold=1e-20)[source]

Transform unpolarized MGGA inputs.

Returns:

rs, zeta, xt, xs0, xs1, u0, u1, t0, t1, mask

jaxlibxc._transforms.transform_mgga_pol(rho, sigma, lapl, tau, dens_threshold=1e-15, sigma_threshold=1e-15, tau_threshold=1e-20)[source]

Transform polarized MGGA inputs.

Returns:

rs, zeta, xt, xs0, xs1, u0, u1, t0, t1, mask
